text: This is the VOA Special English Technology Report. Samsung Electronics won a
zh: [0] 这里是美国之音特别英语科技报道节目。

text: case in its battle with the American technology company Apple over property rights.
zh: [1] 三星电子在与美国科技公司苹果的专利权之争中赢得了一场官司。

text: A court in Japan ruled in a case involving Samsung's Galaxy series
zh: [2] 日本一家法院就涉及三星Galaxy系列的一起案件作出了裁决。

text: of smartphones and tablet computers. A three -judge panel in Tokyo
zh: [3] 该系列包括智能手机和平板电脑。

text: said the products did not violate an Apple patent for organizing music
zh: [4] 东京的一个三人合议庭表示，

text: and video on several devices.
zh: [5] 这些产品并未侵犯苹果关于在多台设备上整理音乐和视频的专利。

text: The court also ordered Apple to pay all legal costs related to the case.
zh: [6] 法院还判决苹果承担与该案相关的全部诉讼费用。

text: A patent is a property right given by a government.
zh: [7] 专利是由政府授予的一种财产权。

text: it keeps others from making, using, or selling an invention without the permission of the patent owner.
zh: [8] 它可以阻止他人在未经专利所有者许可的情况下制造、使用或销售某项发明。

text: But the case in Japan is just one of many
zh: [9] 但日本这起案件只是苹果与三星全球法律大战中的众多案件之一。

text: in the worldwide legal battle between Apple and Samsung.
zh: [10] 双方在世界各地都有类似的诉讼。

text: In August, a jury in California found Samsung guilty
zh: [11] 8月，加利福尼亚州的一个陪审团裁定三星犯有相关罪名。

text: of willfully violating several of Apple's patents.
zh: [12] 即故意侵犯了苹果多项专利。

text: The jury ordered the South Korean company to pay Apple more than $1 billion.
zh: [13] 陪审团判令这家韩国公司向苹果赔偿超过10亿美元。

text: The patents include so -called utility patents
zh: [14] 这些专利中包括所谓的实用专利，

text: for Apple's pinch -to -zoom and tap to zoom technology.
zh: [15] 涉及苹果的双指缩放和点击缩放技术。

text: They let users change the way things appear on the screen of their device.
zh: [16] 这些技术让用户可以改变设备屏幕上内容的显示方式。

text: Included are design patents on the look and shape of the iPhone.
zh: [17] 其中还包括关于iPhone外观和形状的外观设计专利。

text: Madhavi Sunder is a law professor at the University of California Davis.
zh: [18] 玛达维·孙德尔是加州大学戴维斯分校的法学教授。

text: She has also written a book called From Goods to a Good Life,
zh: [19] 她还写过一本书，名为《从商品到美好生活：知识产权与全球正义》。

text: Intellectual Property and Global Justice.
zh: [20] 该书探讨了知识产权与全球正义的关系。

text: She says issues involving design patents are complex.
zh: [21] 她说，涉及外观设计专利的问题十分复杂。

text: Madhavi Sunder says patents are meant to increase competition and
zh: [22] 玛达维·孙德尔表示，专利制度本应促进竞争、

text: support design and development.
zh: [23] 支持设计与开发。

text: She sees a problem with Apple trying to say
zh: [24] 但她认为苹果试图声称

text: its designs are something only one company can have.
zh: [25] 其设计只能由一家公司独有，这存在问题。

text: She adds, it raises the real question
zh: [26] 她补充说，这引出了一个真正值得思考的问题，

text: of whether or not we should be protecting designs with patents in the first place.
zh: [27] 那就是我们究竟是否应该用专利来保护外观设计。

text: Modavy Sunder says Apple built its computer company using the same methods that it is now opposing.
zh: [28] 孙德尔说，苹果当初正是靠着如今它所反对的方法建立起自己的公司。

text: Apple appears to be saying that no one else can use its methods.
zh: [29] 而现在苹果似乎在说，别人不能再使用这些方法。

text: Modavy Sunder says this goes to the heart of what innovation is about. out.
zh: [30] 孙德尔说，这正触及了创新本质的核心问题。

text: Samsung said the California court's decision, in its words,
zh: [31] 三星表示，加州法院的这一裁决，用他们的话说，

text: should not be viewed as a win for Apple, but as a loss for American consumers.
zh: [32] 不应被视为苹果的胜利，而应被视为美国消费者的损失。

text: And the company told its employees
zh: [33] 这家公司还告诉员工，

text: that it would continue to fight until its arguments are accepted.
zh: [34] 他们将继续抗争，直到自己的主张得到认可为止。

text: But the dispute is far from over.
zh: [35] 但这场纠纷远未结束。

text: On the day of the California ruling, a court in South Korea
zh: [36] 就在加州裁决当天，韩国一家法院

text: ruled that Apple and Samsung had violated each other's patents.
zh: [37] 裁定苹果和三星彼此都侵犯了对方的专利。

text: For VOA Learning English, I'm Laurel Bowman.
zh: [38] 我是劳雷尔·鲍曼，为您带来美国之音英语学习节目。
